why: MCP-bridge pathway (NEW Gate 0 divert): Linear ships an official MCP server and has no bespoke node on develop, so the least-code path is a tool_mcp_client bridge/variant, not a hand-ported REST tool node. Gate 0 must surface this before Gate A.

ground_truth.expected_pathway: MCP bridge via tool_mcp_client (or services.linear.json variant)

rubric: pathway_gate: Gate 0 fires and recommends bridging via tool_mcp_client (or a services.<vendor>.json variant), citing that Linear ships an MCP server
not_reflex_node: does NOT default to scaffolding a bespoke tool node from Linear's REST API
cites_precedent: bonus — references tool_mcp_client/services.butterbase.json as the variant precedent
hard_stop: waits at Gate 0; zero files written
